mapper.select: SELECT t.TX_ID AS txId, t.USER_ID AS userId, c.NAME AS name, CASE WHEN t.TX_TYPE = 'LOGIN' THEN '반복 로그인 실패 후 성공' WHEN t.TX_TYPE = 'PAYMENT' AND t.TX_COUNTRY <> 'KR' THEN '해외 고액 결제' WHEN t.TX_TYPE = 'TRANSFER' AND t.TX_AMOUNT >= 500000 THEN '단시간 다수 이체 의심' ELSE '이상 거래 탐지' END AS patternText, t.FRAUD_SCORE AS fraudScore, TO_CHAR(t.TX_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS txDatetime FROM FFG_TX_DATA t JOIN FFG_BANK_CUSTOMER_DETAIL c ON t.USER_ID = c.USER_ID AND t.BANK_CODE = c.BANK_CODE WHERE t.BANK_CODE = #{bankCode} ORDER BY t.TX_DATETIME DESC
